title: os-prober bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[1.74-11.0.1]
- Add patch os-prober-oracle.patch to add Oracle to the list of Linux distributions

[1.74-11]
- Bump release number
- Resolves: #RHEL-55234

[1.74-10]
- 90fallback: include possible kernel parameters from grub's default file
- common.sh: do not resolve symbolic link on mapped device filesystems
- Resolves: #RHEL-55234
full_text:
[1.74-11.0.1]
- Add patch os-prober-oracle.patch to add Oracle to the list of Linux distributions

[1.74-11]
- Bump release number
- Resolves: #RHEL-55234

[1.74-10]
- 90fallback: include possible kernel parameters from grub's default file
- common.sh: do not resolve symbolic link on mapped device filesystems
- Resolves: #RHEL-55234

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-0883.html
